ideation: This animation sequence depicts a guard standing at attention, then looking around, and returning to attention. The guard's arms will remain mostly at their sides, but with slight movements to suggest alertness and vigilance. Frame 1 will show the guard standing at attention, arms straight down. Frame 2 will have the guard's left arm slightly raised, as if glancing to the left. Frame 3 will have the guard looking back to the front, with the left arm returning to its original position. Frame 4 will have the guard looking to the right (with the right arm raised). Frame 5 will show the guard returning to attention. This sequence uses subtle movements to convey the guard's attentiveness without overly dramatic gestures.

frames.beat: guard stands at attention, arms at sides
left arm lifts slightly, scanning left
head turns back, left arm returns to rest
right arm lifts slightly, scanning right
guard returns to attention, both arms still
